definition:
γένημα, -τος, τό 
 (γίγνομαι), [in LXX chiefly for תְּבוּאָה ;] a form not found in cl., but used in LXX, NT and π. (Bl., §3, 10; M, Pr., 45; Deiss., BS, 184), as distinct from γέννημα, which see, 
of fruit, produce of the earth : Mat.26:29, Mrk.14:25, Luk.12:18 22:18, 2Co.9:10 (Rec. γέννημα).†
 (AS)
